sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64657" key="makrokampulau/xhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρο-καμπῠλαύχην</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ενος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with long bending neck</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐρῳδιοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
